component.name: MatrixWhisper
component.summary: Highly optimized WhatsApp Web client with smart controls

description.p: MatrixWhisper is a native, privacy-focused WhatsApp desktop companion designed for Linux. It features advanced per-device audio routing, single-instance execution locking, and a smart mute system.

ul.li: Advanced Audio Routing: Dynamically change output channels (PipeWire/PulseAudio) safely without leaks.
Smart Mute: Instantly silence audio streams for 1 or 8 hours.
System Tray Integration: Minimizes cleanly into the background with unread badge counts.
Resource Efficient: Optional hardware acceleration toggle to reduce GPU and battery load.
